name: ts-orm-benchmark
description: ⚡ TypeScript ORM & query builder SQL generation benchmark — UQL vs Sequelize vs TypeORM vs MikroORM vs Drizzle vs Knex vs Kysely

scripts.bench: rm -f bench-1.json bench-2.json bench-3.json && npx vitest bench --run --outputJson bench-1.json && npx vitest bench --run --outputJson bench-2.json && npx vitest bench --run --outputJson bench-3.json && bun scripts/average-bench.ts bench-1.json bench-2.json bench-3.json && rm -f bench-1.json bench-2.json bench-3.json

author: Roger Padilla <sonemonu@gmail.com>
